utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Cassie , how you ... how you doing on that ... hot dog .

utterances.speaker: Cassie
utterances.text: I guess the last time we really hung out was when our parents rented that beach house together .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ooh , remember the time I uh , I pinned you down and tickled you til you cried ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_remember the time I uh , I pinned you down and tickled you til you cried ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: We are probably too old to do that now .

emotion_cause.span: 8_We are probably too old to do that now .

utterances.speaker: Cassie
utterances.text: I will always remember that summer , because it is when I got all of these freckles .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I will always remember that summer , because it is when I got all of these freckles .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Uh ... huh ! Uh ... huh ! And ... and ... and I will always remember that summer because that is when I realized that we are related .

utterances.speaker: Cassie
utterances.text: It took you that long to figure it out , huh ?

emotion_cause.span: 11_It took you that long to figure it out

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well I am , I am a little slow . Just as our children would be .
